title: ‘Blast them or make a deal’: Trump lays out choice for Iran, calls war criticism ‘treasonous’
summary_full: US President Trump presented a stark choice on Iran: negotiate a settlement or face military escalation, though he personally prefers avoiding conflict. He expressed dissatisfaction with Iran's deal proposals, citing internal leadership disarray. Trump also labelled domestic criticism of the war effort as 'treasonous' and defended past US actions against Iran's nuclear program, vowing not to withdraw prematurely.
